# Career Analysis Project 

## Current Progress

Today the project mainly focused on building the homepage structure and the psychological side of stream selection after class 10.

### Sections Completed

* What is Stream Selection?
* Why Students Get Confused?
* Marks vs Interests
* Common Misconceptions
* Student Mindset During Stream Selection
* Stream Selection Percentage Analysis
* Regret After Wrong Stream Selection
* Self-Aware Student Mindset (planning stage)
* Traditional Path vs Modern Opportunity-Based Path (planning stage)

---

## Project Direction

This project is not only focused on data analysis but also on:

* student psychology
* career awareness
* self-awareness
* modern opportunities
* mindset analysis
* future career trends

The goal is to combine:

* markdown explanations
* real-world datasets
* pandas analysis
* visualizations
* insights and storytelling

---

## Data Work

Datasets being added:

* stream selection percentage data
* student regret statistics
* student mindset datasets
* pressure and influence data
* traditional vs modern career mindset data

Current data collection methods:

* manual structured datasets
* Wikipedia research
* beginner web scraping practice using BeautifulSoup and Requests

---

## Technologies Used

* Python
* Pandas
* NumPy
* Matplotlib
* Jupyter Notebook
* BeautifulSoup
* Requests

Future Plans:

* Flask UI integration
* interactive visualizations
* animated graphs
* API-based data collection
* career recommendation logic

---

## Current Goal

The current goal is to first make the project:

* structured
* informative
* data-driven
* readable

before focusing on advanced UI/UX design.

---
